# Expected review-intent output (synthetic golden)

## 1. Conformance
- No flags. Empty-cart branch produces `EMPTY_CART`; non-empty branch produces `accepted`, satisfying the scenario.

## 2. Minimalism (YAGNI)
- No flags. No extra parameters, fields, or branches beyond what the scenario forces.

## 3. Side effects
- No flags. Pure function; no I/O, no mutation, no global state.

## Verdict

VERDICT: OK
